productDisplayName: Nike Men Crickt Black Track Pants
description: Composition Midnight black track pants, made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, made of Dri-Fit fabric, has an elastic waist with drawcord, mesh-lined side pockets and mesh inserts at side seams Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Do not use softeners or bleach Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not line dry Do not dry clean Do not iron Add some speed to your stride in the nike men's Woven Track Pants, an ultra-lightweight design that's ready to go the distance. Created using hard-working fabric and providing ventilation where you need it most, these running pants keep you focused on the finish.
